atfPropertyHighlights.name: Hygiene Plus
atfPropertyHighlights.tooltip: To help our travelers make informed and safe travel decisions, Hygiene Plus has been initiated. Our partners listed under this campaign are committed to providing a clean environment to guests.

atfPropertyHighlights.name: Sparkling clean
atfPropertyHighlights.tooltip: Guests have rated this property 9.5/10 on cleanliness

atfPropertyHighlights.name: Top Value
atfPropertyHighlights.tooltip: Guests rated this property 9.5/10 on value for money

description.short: Get your trip off to a great start with a stay at this property, which offers car park free of charge. Conveniently situated in the Takengon part of Aceh, this property puts you close to attractions and interesting dining options. Don't leave before paying a visit to the famous Sultan Iskandar Muda International Airport.  This 4-star property is packed with in-house facilities to improve the quality and joy of your stay.

details.title: Infant 0-1 year(s)
details.description: Stay for free if using existing bedding. Note, if you need a cot, it may incur an extra charge and is subject to availability.

details.title: Children 2-12 year(s)
details.description: Stay for free if using existing bedding.

adult: Guests 13 years and older are considered adults.
extraBed: Extra beds are dependent on the room you choose. Please check the individual room capacity for more details.
additional: When booking more than 5 rooms, different policies and additional supplements may apply.
